payload.subject: Request: build multi-actor ActivityPub server on unratified.org — observatory as first tenant
payload.context: Observatory wants to federate HRCB evaluations to the Fediverse. unratified.org hosts a multi-actor AP server. Observatory becomes @observatory@unratified.org. Future actors: @blog, @safety-quotient, @unratified.

endpoints_needed.publish: POST /ap/publish — authenticated webhook from observatory, triggers delivery fan-out

architecture_proposal.http_signatures: draft-cavage-http-signatures-12 (NOT RFC 9421 — Mastodon hasn't upgraded). keyId = actor URL + #main-key.
architecture_proposal.delivery: CF Queues — one message per follower inbox; shared_inbox optimization; exponential backoff max 3 retries

phasing.phase_1: Actor + WebFinger + Outbox (read-only identity — profile visible on Mastodon)
phasing.phase_3: Delivery + /ap/publish endpoint (fan-out to followers on new content)

payload.what_observatory_will_build: ~20 lines in cron.ts — POST each evaluated story to /ap/publish with Bearer token. Blocked on publish endpoint existing.

claims.text: Multi-actor AP servers are standard architecture.
